ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., UA, GOOG) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the stock's data */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the technical indicator is calculated */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the dashboard */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock ticker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the component */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the component */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the component within the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_components_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_components_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access log */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
